title: This Ex-Quant Had to Quit Wall Street to Build a 24/7 Stock Exchange | QFEX, Annanay Kapila
summary: Annanay Kapila, a former quantitative trader who moved billions daily, argues that high-frequency trading adds no value and extracts wealth through structural market inefficiencies. He left finance to build QFEX, a 24/7 global stock exchange, driven by FTX's product innovation and a belief that traditional markets need fundamental rebuilding.
